name: Sweet and Sour Meatloaf
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the first 4 ingredients to make a sauce.
2. Combine the remaining ingredients in a large bowl. Add half of the tomato sauce mixture.
3. Knead the mixture together with your hands until well combined.
4. Place the meatloaf mixture in a loaf pan.
5. Pour the remaining tomato sauce over the meatloaf.
6. Bake at 400 degrees Fahrenheit for 45 minutes, or until cooked through.
